requiresBeforeBackfill.reason: the typed placement columns and colony catalogue must exist before any placement can be backfilled

attribution.method: normalized actor (lower, non-alphanumeric to space, trimmed) matched to a unique in-game player via player_import_aliases.normalized_alias or players.display_name within the game group
attribution.unresolvedHandling: owner_player_id, owner_game_player_id, and player_id remain null; ownership_state remains 'unknown'; attribution is never fabricated

notes: Attribution resolution reads player_import_aliases first so it stays valid after the privacy migration neutralizes unlinked players.display_name; the display-name path is a fallback only.
The 100 grid-format placements recover their original row/position from the stored raw_line; the 1,400 flat-format placements retain their upstream numeric space id.
This dry run performed zero writes. The production backfill and its report are a separate, separately authorized artifact.
